Name Unit Description

Abs ADim

Returns the modulus (magnitude) of a complex number.
Abs ADim

Returns the absolute value of a real number.

ArcCos ADim

Returns the arc cosine of AValue as an angle quantity in radians.
ArcSin ADim

Returns the arc sine of AValue as an angle quantity in radians.
ArcTan ADim

Returns the arc tangent of AValue as an angle quantity in radians.
ArcTan2 ADim

Returns the arc tangent of y/x as an angle quantity in radians, using the signs of both arguments to determine the correct quadrant.
AstronomicalUnit ADim

 
atm ADim

BoltzmannConstant ADim

C2 ADim

 
C2IdentityMatrix ADim

Returns the 2×2 identity matrix over ℂ.
C2NullMatrix ADim

Returns the 2×2 zero matrix over ℂ.
C2NullVector ADim

Returns the zero vector of ℂ².
C3IdentityMatrix ADim

Returns the 3×3 identity matrix over ℂ.
C3NullMatrix ADim

Returns the 3×3 zero matrix over ℂ.
C3NullVector ADim

Returns the zero vector of ℂ³.
C4IdentityMatrix ADim

Returns the 4×4 identity matrix over ℂ.
C4NullMatrix ADim

Returns the 4×4 zero matrix over ℂ.
C4NullVector ADim

Returns the zero vector of ℂ⁴.

Check ADim

Checks that two dimensions are equal and raises an exception if they differ.
CheckDiv ADim

Returns the dimension resulting from dividing two quantities.
CheckEqual ADim

Checks that two dimensions are equal and returns the common dimension.
CheckMul ADim

Returns the dimension resulting from multiplying two quantities.
CheckSub ADim

Validates that two dimensions are compatible for subtraction and returns the common dimension.
CheckSum ADim

Validates that two dimensions are compatible for addition and returns the common dimension.
cL ADim

 
CL3NullBivector ADim

The zero bivector of Cl(3,0).
CL3NullMultivector ADim

The zero multivector of Cl(3,0).
CL3NullScalar ADim

The zero scalar of Cl(3,0).
CL3NullTrivector ADim

The zero trivector of Cl(3,0).
CL3NullVector ADim

The zero vector of Cl(3,0).
cm ADim

 
cm2 ADim

 
cm3 ADim

 
cm4 ADim

 
cm5 ADim

 
cm6 ADim

 
Commutator ADim

Returns the commutator of two 4×4 complex matrices.
Commutator ADim

Returns the commutator of two 2×2 complex matrices.
Commutator ADim

Returns the commutator of two 3×3 complex matrices.
Complex ADimC

 
ComplexCubicPower ADim

Returns the cube of the complex number AValue.
ComplexCubicPower ADim

Returns the cube of the complex quantity AQuantity.
ComplexCubicRoot ADim

Returns all cube roots of the complex number AValue as a fixed-size array.
ComplexQuarticPower ADim

Returns the fourth power of the complex number AValue.
ComplexQuarticPower ADim

Returns the fourth power of the complex quantity AQuantity.
ComplexQuarticRoot ADim

Returns all fourth roots of the complex number AValue as a fixed-size array.
ComplexSquarePower ADim

Returns the square of the complex number AValue.
ComplexSquarePower ADim

Returns the square of the complex quantity AQuantity.
ComplexSquareRoot ADim

Returns all square roots of the complex number AValue as a fixed-size array.
ComptonWaveLength ADim

Compton wavelength λC = 2.42631023867 × 10⁻¹² m.
Cos ADim

Returns the cosine of the angle quantity.
Cosecant ADim

Returns the cosecant of the angle quantity: 1/sin(θ).
Cotan ADim

Returns the cotangent of the angle quantity: cos(θ)/sin(θ).
CoulombConstant ADim

Coulomb constant ke = 8.9875517923 × 10⁹ N·m²·C⁻².

Returns True if two 2-component complex vectors are equal within the default floating point tolerance.

SameValueEx ADim

Returns True if two real physical quantities are equal within the default floating point tolerance.

Returns True if two complex numbers are equal within the default floating point tolerance.
SameValueEx ADim

Returns True if two real numbers are equal within the default floating point tolerance.

SolveEquation ADim

Solves the linear equation a·x = 0 over the reals.
SolveEquation ADim

Solves the linear equation a·z = 0 over the complex numbers.
SolveEquation ADim

Solves the cubic equation a·z³ + b·z² + c·z + d = 0 over the complex numbers using Cardano's method.
SolveEquation ADim

Solves the quadratic equation a·z² + b·z + c = 0 over the complex numbers.
SolveEquation ADim

Solves the linear equation a·z + b = 0 over the complex numbers.
SoundIntensityReference ADim

SpeedOfLight ADim

Speed of light in vacuum c = 299792458 m·s⁻¹.

TCL3BivecQuantity ADim

Represents a pure bivector (grade-2 element) of Cl(3,0) with physical dimensions.
TCL3BivecQuantityHelper ADim

Record helper for TCL3BivecQuantity providing geometric operations specific to grade-2 elements of Cl(3,0) with physical dimensions.
TCL3Bivector ADim

Represents a pure bivector (grade-2 element) in the Clifford algebra Cl(3,0).
TCL3BivectorHelper ADim

Record helper for TCL3Bivector providing geometric operations specific to grade-2 elements of Cl(3,0).
TCL3Biversor12 ADim

Represents the basis bivector e₁∧e₂ of Cl(3,0).
TCL3Biversor13 ADim

Represents the basis bivector e₁∧e₃ of Cl(3,0).
TCL3Biversor23 ADim

Represents the basis bivector e₂∧e₃ of Cl(3,0).
TCL3MultivecQuantity ADim

Represents a general multivector of Cl(3,0) with physical dimensions.
TCL3MultivecQuantityHelper ADim

Record helper for TCL3MultivecQuantity providing the full set of geometric algebra operations on multivector quantities of Cl(3,0).
TCL3Multivector ADim

Represents a general multivector in the Clifford algebra Cl(3,0) over R3.
TCL3MultivectorComponent ADim

Enumeration of the eight basis blade components of a multivector in the Clifford algebra Cl(3,0) over R3.
TCL3MultivectorComponents ADim

A set of TCL3MultivectorComponent values.
TCL3MultivectorHelper ADim

Record helper for TCL3Multivector providing the full set of geometric algebra operations for Cl(3,0).
TCL3TrivecQuantity ADim

Represents a pure trivector (grade-3 element) of Cl(3,0) with physical dimensions.
TCL3TrivecQuantityHelper ADim

Record helper for TCL3TrivecQuantity providing geometric operations specific to grade-3 elements of Cl(3,0) with physical dimensions.
TCL3Trivector ADim

Represents a pure trivector (pseudoscalar) in the Clifford algebra Cl(3,0).
TCL3TrivectorHelper ADim

Record helper for TCL3Trivector providing geometric operations specific to grade-3 elements of Cl(3,0).
TCL3Triversor123 ADim

Represents the unit pseudoscalar e₁∧e₂∧e₃ of Cl(3,0).
TCL3VecQuantity ADim

Represents a pure vector (grade-1 element) of Cl(3,0) with physical dimensions.
TCL3VecQuantityHelper ADim

Record helper for TCL3VecQuantity providing geometric operations specific to grade-1 elements of Cl(3,0) with physical dimensions.
TCL3Vector ADim

Represents a pure vector (grade-1 element) in the Clifford algebra Cl(3,0).
TCL3VectorHelper ADim

Record helper for TCL3Vector providing geometric operations specific to grade-1 elements of Cl(3,0).
TCL3Versor1 ADim

Represents the basis vector e₁ of Cl(3,0).
TCL3Versor2 ADim

Represents the basis vector e₂ of Cl(3,0).
TCL3Versor3 ADim

Represents the basis vector e₃ of Cl(3,0).
TCMatrix ADim

Generic square matrix of complex values (TComplex) with dimension TSpace.N × TSpace.N.
TCMatrixQuantity ADim

Generic square matrix of complex physical quantities (TComplexQuantity) with dimension TSpace.N × TSpace.N.
TComplex ADim

Represents a complex number in Cartesian form: z = Re + i·Im.
TComplexQuantity ADim

Represents a complex quantity with physical dimensions.
TComplexQuantityHelper ADim

Record helper for TComplexQuantity providing additional operations on complex physical quantities.
TCVecQuantity ADim

Generic column vector of complex physical quantities (TComplexQuantity) with TSpace.N components.
TCVector ADim

Generic column vector of complex values (TComplex) with TSpace.N components.
TDegreeCelsiusUnit ADim

Represents the degree Celsius temperature unit (°C).
TDegreeCelsiusUnitHelper ADim

Record helper for TDegreeCelsiusUnit providing conversion and formatting operations for temperatures expressed in degrees Celsius.
TDegreeFahrenheitUnit ADim

Represents the degree Fahrenheit temperature unit (°F).
TDegreeFahrenheitUnitHelper ADim

Record helper for TDegreeFahrenheitUnit providing conversion and formatting operations for temperatures expressed in degrees Fahrenheit.
TDimension ADimTypes

Represents the physical dimension of a quantity using the SI base units.

TRMatrix ADim

Generic square matrix of real values (double) with dimension TSpace.N × TSpace.N.
TRMatrixQuantity ADim

Generic square matrix of real physical quantities (TQuantity) with dimension TSpace.N × TSpace.N.
TRVecQuantity ADim

Generic column vector of real physical quantities (TQuantity) with TSpace.N components.
TRVector ADim

Generic column vector of real values (double) with TSpace.N components.

Represents a physical unit of measurement with its dimensional signature, symbol, name and prefix information.

Record helper for TUnit providing conversion and formatting operations for all supported quantity types.
